module.name: phyto_tc_batch_tracker
module.description: Links tissue-culture products to propagation batch records so buyers can see the full provenance of every plant they purchase. Admin features include mother-batch lineage tracking, a contamination log, printable QR labels, inventory auto-decrement when orders are shipped, and automatic low-stock email alerts. Purpose-built for TC nurseries that need documented batch traceability from flask to dispatch.
module.author: PhytoCommerce
